items.title: Food banks, affordable-housing providers scramble as inflation hammers low-income Americans
items.description: One Dallas food bank says demand for food assistance has surpassed what was seen during the financial crisis and the pandemic, a Federal Reserve survey has found.

items.title: BlackRock has best-ever start to a year as investment flows double and profits surge
items.description: Shares of BlackRock rallied to their best day in more than a year on Wednesday, after strong inflows into exchange-traded funds and buoyant markets helped the world’s biggest asset manager beat Wall S

items.description: If Korea allows mutual conversion, then the ADR premium may contract.

items.title: What the launch of SK Hynix leveraged ETFs tells us about the hottest trade on Wall Street
items.description: Investors are still enthusiastic about the memory boom, and are looking for new ways to cash in.

items.title: AI is killing the cover letter — but here’s when it still pays to send one
items.description: “For really everyone other than AI providers, the process is broken.”

items.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
items.description: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

items.title: This isn’t a plan to save Social Security. It’s a plan to have a plan.
items.description: A bipartisan group of senators, most of whom are retiring, is trying to move the ball forward just a little.

items.title: ‘They cut off online access’: My mother’s bank balance plummeted after her death. What’s going on?
items.description: “Since her death, her bank balance fell to $9,000 from $16,000.”

items.title: IBM employees losing $400 million on the company’s stock should be a wake-up call
items.description: Don’t put all your eggs in one basket
